title: [InstCombine] Prevent infinite loop with two shifts

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary discusses casts but focuses on ptrtoint. zext/trunc/sext of constants are also ImmConstants but not explicitly mentioned. This tests type conversion instructions wrapping constant values.

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i64 @shift_by_zext_constant() {
#0:
  %c = zext i32 4 to i64
  %shl = shl i64 1, %c
  ret i64 %shl
}
=>
define i64 @shift_by_zext_constant() {
#0:
  ret i64 16
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary doesn't mention comparison results that evaluate to constants. icmp with constant operands produces ImmConstant through the boolean result, caught by m_ImmConstant matcher.

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i64 @shift_by_icmp_result() {
#0:
  %cmp = icmp eq i32 5, 5, offsetonly
  %c = zext i1 %cmp to i64
  %shl = shl i64 1024, %c
  ret i64 %shl
}
=>
define i64 @shift_by_icmp_result() {
#0:
  ret i64 2048
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary mentions constants wrapped in casts but not select instructions where both branches are identical constants. m_ImmConstant recognizes select with constant-equivalent branches as compile-time constant.

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i64 @shift_by_select_constants(i1 %cond) {
#0:
  %s = select i1 %cond, i64 3, i64 3
  %shl = shl i64 1, %s
  ret i64 %shl
}
=>
define i64 @shift_by_select_constants(i1 %cond) {
#0:
  ret i64 8
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors
